title: Yellow loading screen
description: A resource pack that turn loading screen into yellow themed 💛
body:
![Loading screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3vjcXwkn/images/ef37061787f12793c09bd998f469be8f7b653439.png)

A warm pastel-yellow makeover that makes your Minecraft loading screen bright, cozy, and irresistibly cute. 🌼✨


<details>
  <summary>💜 Questions</summary>

---
**💜 How to install?**
> Download this resource pack then put this on your minecraft resource pack folder and enjoy it 🤭
---
**💜 Which version are supported?**
> Currently 1.21.10 - 1.21.9 mainly supported but maybe other versions also supported. I didn't tested out the other versions 🙂
---
**💜 Does it need any requirements?**
> Yeah, you need a mod named **Puzzle**. Download from here https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle
---
**💜 I need help!**
> Here is my discord id `@snowyy173` and you can message me there if you need help 😉
---
</details>
